# Transcrição: 41. Trait 40 - Great Salespeople have the work ethic of an obsessed maniac.

- **Fonte:** 41. Trait 40 - Great Salespeople have the work ethic of an obsessed maniac.
- **Duração:** 01:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:15]

Look, great salespeople have a work ethic of that of an obsessed person and the persistence of a person that almost appears to be a maniac. And you're like, Grant, I don't have that. You need to get it. You need to get it if you're going to dominate your marketplace. If you're going to get the great things out of your business and truly build a great business and be considered one of the great salespeople, you have to outwork everyone. You have to be willing to do whatever it takes and then be willing to do the stuff that other people will not do. Don't trust your talent. Trust effort. Trust that work ethic that shows up, does whatever it takes, goes the extra mile, doesn't quit when other people do, and when you walk into the room, people are going to be like, oh my god, that guy's in a completely different league. How would that feel to you? To walk into a room or go to a convention and you walk in and they're like, oh, there he is. See, that's going to come from work ethic, effort, extra mile, doing what other people refuse to do. Well, somebody once told me, you know, if you just do what you love to do, you'll be successful. Hey, it's BS. You got to learn how to do the things you hate, okay, and then you'll be successful.
